title: Sqlitelogictest - Aggregation query on empty table with DISTINCT clause
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(pk INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col0 INTEGER, col1 FLOAT, col2 TEXT, col3 INTEGER, col4 FLOAT, col5 TEXT);
SELECT - MIN ( DISTINCT + 79 ) FROM tab0 AS cor0 WHERE NOT + col4 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Aggregation query on empty table with DISTINCT clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(pk INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col_a INTEGER, col_b FLOAT, col_c TEXT, col_d INTEGER, col_e FLOAT, col_f TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table(col_a, col_b, col_c, col_d, col_e, col_f) VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT MIN(DISTINCT col_b) FROM test_table WHERE col_a IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, description TEXT);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
